message:
fix(tmux): use TMUX_PANE targeting for session name resolution

All display-message calls that resolve the current session name now
target the callers specific pane via TMUX_PANE, preventing tmux from
returning an arbitrary session when multiple sessions share the town
socket. Applied consistently across costs, helpers, handoff, and the
tmux package.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
